message:
feat(polyfills): add DNS resolution and fix path normalization

- Add dns.zig with real DNS resolution using system getaddrinfo
  - dns.lookup() returns {address, family}
  - dns.resolve4() returns array of IPv4 addresses
  - dns.resolve6() returns array of IPv6 addresses
  - dns.reverse() for reverse lookups

- Fix path.zig normalization bugs:
  - basename() now strips trailing slashes
  - parse() now strips trailing slashes
  - join() normalizes multiple consecutive slashes
  - resolve() processes left-to-right correctly

- Register require and dns polyfills in native_main_embed.zig
- Update zlib.js dns module to use native _dns if available

Test results: 1115 pass, 37 fail (up from baseline)
